sentences.arabic: يُعَدُّ الْأَمْنُ السَّيْبِرَانِيُّ الرَّكِيزَةَ الْأَسَاسِيَّةَ لِحِمَايَةِ الْبِنْيَةِ التَّحْتِيَّةِ الرَّقْمِيَّةِ فِي الْعَصْرِ الْحَدِيثِ.
sentences.translation: Kibersigurnost se smatra osnovnim stubom zaštite digitalne infrastrukture u modernom dobu.
sentences.translationEn: Cybersecurity is considered the fundamental pillar for protecting digital infrastructure in the modern age.

sentences.arabic: تَتَعَرَّضُ الْمُؤَسَّسَاتُ الْكُبْرَى لِتَهْدِيدَاتٍ مُسْتَمِرَّةٍ مِنْ قِبَلِ الْمُخْتَرِقِينَ الَّذِينَ يَسْعَوْنَ لِسَرِقَةِ الْبَيَانَاتِ الْحَسَّاسَةِ.
sentences.translation: Velike institucije izložene su stalnim prijetnjama hakera koji nastoje ukrasti osjetljive podatke.
sentences.translationEn: Large institutions are exposed to constant threats from hackers seeking to steal sensitive data.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، تَتَسَابَقُ الشَّرِكَاتُ لِتَطْوِيرِ بَرْمَجِيَّاتٍ مُتَقَدِّمَةٍ قَادِرَةٍ عَلَى صَدِّ الْهَجَمَاتِ الْإِلِكْتُرُونِيَّةِ بِفَعَالِيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Zbog toga se kompanije utrkuju u razvoju naprednih softvera sposobnih da efikasno odbiju elektronske napade.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, companies are racing to develop advanced software capable of effectively repelling electronic attacks.

sentences.arabic: التَّوْعِيَةُ الرَّقْمِيَّةُ لِلْأَفْرَادِ تَلْعَبُ دَوْرًا حَاسِمًا فِي تَقْلِيلِ الْمَخَاطِرِ النَّاتِجَةِ عَنِ الِاحْتِيَالِ عَبْرَ الْإِنْتَرْنِتِ.
sentences.translation: Digitalna svijest pojedinaca igra ključnu ulogu u smanjenju rizika koji proizlaze iz internet prevara.
sentences.translationEn: Digital awareness among individuals plays a crucial role in reducing risks resulting from online fraud.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الِاسْتِثْمَارَ فِي هَذَا الْمَجَالِ لَيْسَ مُجَرَّدَ خِيَارٍ، بَلْ هُوَ ضَرُورَةٌ مُلِحَّةٌ لِحِمَايَةِ الِاقْتِصَادِ الْعَالَمِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Investiranje u ovu oblast nije samo opcija, već hitna potreba za zaštitu globalne ekonomije.
sentences.translationEn: Investing in this field is not just an option, but an urgent necessity to protect the global economy.
